revision.comment: Created page with "{{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a shrine in [[Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]].<ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181734</ref>"
revision.text: {{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a shrine in [[Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]].<ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181734</ref>

revision.comment: Adding categories based on Wikidata P31: Shikinai Shosha
revision.text: {{nihongo|'''Tenjin-sha'''|天神社}} is a shrine in [[Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]].<ref>https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181734</ref> ==References== {{wikidata link|Q137041912}} [[Category:Shikinai Shosha]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Shikinai Shosha" to "Shikinai Shōsha"
